title: selaginella crassinervia
intro: Selaginella crassinervia, also known as Spreading Airplant or Selaginella, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae, characterized by its ability to photosynthesize without roots or stems. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella crassinervia include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. In herbal preparations, Selaginella crassinervia is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
